full_description: TravelPal is a travel planning app that helps users organize and plan their trips. It provides a simple way to manage itineraries, bookings, and travel documents. With TravelPal, you can easily create and edit your trip itinerary, add bookings for flights, hotels, and car rentals, and store your travel documents such as passports, visas, and travel insurance. The app also allows you to set reminders for check-in, flight departures, and other important travel events. Additionally, TravelPal provides a map view of your trip, making it easy to visualize your journey and get directions to your destinations. Whether you're a frequent traveler or planning a dream vacation, TravelPal is the perfect companion to help you stay organized and make the most of your trip.
